title: Career Opportunity Logistics Manager at Blue Dart Global Group

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Logistics Manager at Blue Dart Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Blue Dart Global Group has an exciting opening for a Logistics Manager at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Blue Dart Global Group:
Blue Dart Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Dart Global Group!
